title: CMHO Dantewada – Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More – 23 Posts
shortInfo: Chief Medical and Health Office Dantewada (CMHO Dantewada) Recruitment 2026 for 23 posts of Staff Nurse, Security Guard and More. Candidates with BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, BDS, BPT, D.Pharm, B.Sc. Nursing/GNM, Graduate, 10th Pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CMHO Dantewada official website.

qualification.education_qualification: BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, BDS, BPT, D.Pharm, B.Sc. Nursing/GNM, DTYDHH, Graduate with DCA, 10th Pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMHO Dantewada Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
